MINI MINUTES:

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default UD Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: G. CASEY, #8098

MICHAEL ROSSOFF, Esq. appeared for plaintiff COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant LI FANG XIONG.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff COMMUNITY HAOUSING PARTNERSHIP, and against the Defaulted Defendant LI FANG XIONG as follows:

RENTS & PER DIEM DAMAGES $1193.24

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
